RankCode.title: Rank Activation Code
RankCode.description: A unique code generated after purchase to be redeemed in-game.

username.description: The Minecraft username of the purchaser.

rankId.description: The ID of the rank purchased (e.g., 'Pure').

used.description: Whether the code has already been redeemed in-game.

/rank_codes/{codeId}.description: Collection of activation codes for ranks.
